subject: Helm Chart Standardization Sniro-Emulator(Mock)
commit_message:
Helm Chart Standardization Sniro-Emulator(Mock)

This task also includes renaming of mock project into sniro-emulator

Issue-ID: OOM-741

Change-Id: Ib0352f7ecb10019f940c571de073dc0af7056ee5
Signed-off-by: vaibhav <vaibhav.chopra@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 3:

Hi All,

I have included service name changes as well, Please review it.

Patch Set 3: Verified-1

Vaibhav, you will need to update the ONAP chart's requirements yaml.  It is looking for mock chart version 0.1.0 and you have just changed it 2.0.0.

...Successfully got an update from the "local" chart repository
Update Complete. \u2388Happy Helming!\u2388
Error: Can't get a valid version for repositories mock. Try changing the version constraint in requirements.yaml
Makefile:42: recipe for target 'dep-onap' failed
make[1]: *** [dep-onap] Error 1
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/mkhinda/onap-gerrit/oom/kubernetes'
Makefile:35: recipe for target 'onap' failed
make: *** [onap] Error 2

Patch Set 4: Verified+1

I have verified mock comes up in integration lab. @Vaibhav please address Borislav's comments and we can merge.

Patch Set 4:

> (2 comments)

Hi Borislav,

If we will do so, then below would happen:-

root@k8s-1:/vaibhav/mock2/oom/kubernetes/mock# kubectl get pods --all-namespaces | grep -i onap
onap          nihilist-poodle-mock-5fb45bdf9-56n6g   1/1       Running            0          2m

root@k8s-1:/vaibhav/mock2/oom/kubernetes/mock# kubectl get svc --all-namespaces | grep -i onap
onap          sniro-emulator         NodePort       10.43.203.27    <none>         80:30288/TCP   

That means the Service name and POD name would be different, So do you want me to change the app name as well in values.yaml if that doesnt affect anything


I used global repo values in order to sync it as per the service name and same is also there in the repo set as well

Containers:
  mock:
    Container ID:
    Image:          nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/sniroemulator
